summary: 3-phase plan to move 2 generic temporal files to Foundations and replace 32 redundant Bimodal theorems with wrap/unwrap bridge wrappers

artifacts.summary: Implementation plan with 3 phases: (1) move TemporalDerived.lean and FrameConditions.lean to Foundations/Logic/Theorems/Temporal/, (2) replace 32 redundant concrete theorems in 3 Bimodal files with bridge wrappers preserving API signatures, (3) full build verification. Estimated 4 hours.
